name: Pineapple Mustard Eggroll
recipeIngredient: 1 cup bite-sized pieces of fresh pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread a thin layer of hot honey mustard on the center of each won ton wrapper.
2. Place one piece of pineapple in the center of the wrapper.
3. Fold the wrapper over the pineapple, pinching the edges to seal.
4. Repeat with remaining wrappers and pieces of pineapple.
5. Steam the wrapped eggrolls for 5 minutes in a steaming tray or Black and Decker rice steamer.
6. Serve with additional hot sauce on the side. Optionally, boil the eggrolls for up to 5 minutes in apple cider for a different appearance.
